Customers & Stylists Appointment Calendar Our Salon & Spa ERP software features a color-coded appointment calendar that offers a comprehensive view of salon customer and stylist bookings. Effortlessly...

An All-In-One Salon POS System for Spa and Beauty Salons. Manage appointments, billing, packages, services, commissions, accounts, day closing.

Customers & Stylists Appointment Calendar Our Salon & Spa ERP software features a color-coded appointment calendar that offers a comprehensive view of salon customer and stylist bookings. Effortlessly add new appointments, edit existing ones, and manage specialist availability. Optimize your stylists' productivity by efficiently managing their work hours and schedules. The system automatically sends confirmation SMS and emails to customers, ensuring they are well-informed about their salon or spa appointments. Additionally, the software tracks each employee's expertise, work shifts, and days off, providing clear visibility into who is working and which customer is being served at any given time. This streamlined approach enhances overall salon management and customer satisfaction.

Customers & Stylists Appointment Calendar

Our Salon & Spa ERP software features a color-coded appointment calendar that offers a comprehensive view of salon customer and stylist bookings. Effortlessly add new appointments, edit existing ones, and manage specialist availability. Optimize your stylists' productivity by efficiently managing their work hours and schedules. The system automatically sends confirmation SMS and emails to customers, ensuring they are well-informed about their salon or spa appointments. Additionally, the software tracks each employee's expertise, work shifts, and days off, providing clear visibility into who is working and which customer is being served at any given time. This streamlined approach enhances overall salon management and customer satisfaction.

Employee Targets & Commissions

Set clear staff targets to motivate your team and drive performance in key areas crucial to your salon and spa business. Define employee commissions based on sales of services and products to incentivize and reward high performance. Our system provides detailed reports on staff achievements, making it easy to calculate commission payouts accurately. By tracking these metrics, you can ensure that your staff is aligned with your business goals and recognize their contributions effectively. This approach helps improve employee engagement, boost sales, and enhance overall productivity in your salon or spa.

Manage Inventory

Minimize business losses with tight inventory control using our supermarket store management software. Effectively reduce theft, misplacement, and incorrect valuation that impact your current assets. Our comprehensive stock and inventory control module enhances operational efficiency by tracking items from purchase through warehousing to sales. Choose between FIFO or Moving Average methods for accurate valuation. The integrated inventory system provides a real-time view of product availability, stock levels across warehouses, and stock transfers. This ensures you maintain optimal stock levels, prevent damage, and streamline inventory management, ultimately safeguarding your assets and improving overall business performance.

Packages & Coupons

Our salon & spa ERP software allows you to create and manage customized packages with set expiry dates, giving you full control over your service offerings. Easily sell these packages and track their usage to monitor customer engagement and satisfaction. You can activate or deactivate specific packages as needed to fit your business needs. Additionally, design and implement your own sales promotions, including discounts, coupons, and gift cards, to boost sales and attract more customers. This flexible system enhances your ability to manage promotions effectively, increase revenue, and tailor your offerings to meet customer demands.

Automated Accounting

Our Salon & Spa ERP software is supported by a robust international standard accounting package that is fully IFRS compliant. The system automates ledger entries to minimize manual data entry and enhance accuracy. Key features include a comprehensive Chart of Accounts, management of Opening Account Balances, Taxes, Advance Payments, Budgeting, and Subscription Management. Automatic VAT calculations and VAT report generation ensure compliance with local tax laws. Detailed Profit and Loss statements and Balance Sheets can be analyzed by branch. Accounts Payable and Receivable reports aid in managing cash flow, while precise item valuation, including all indirect costs, ensures accurate profitability per item.

Customer Management

Efficiently manage and communicate with all your customers using our advanced salon & spa ERP software. Access detailed customer information and utilize email to notify them of new promotions or send personalized greetings for special occasions. Quickly create and update customer records in the database for streamlined management. The Point of Sales contact system allows you to categorize customers in various ways, optimizing communication and service. Manage customer credit limits effectively and access detailed payment aging reports to monitor and manage outstanding balances. This comprehensive approach enhances customer relationship management, improves financial oversight, and supports efficient operations.

Point of Sales Terminal

Ensure uninterrupted sales operations even during internet disruptions with our robust Point of Sale (POS) system. Users can continue serving customers seamlessly without affecting sales transactions. Once the internet connection is restored, the system automatically synchronizes data, posting both accounting and stock entries. Our POS module features a clear, intuitive interface with easy search capabilities and a single checkout screen for efficient sales transactions and commonly used tasks. Compatible with any device, our user-friendly POS software is highly flexible and fully integrated with your inventory for real-time retail management. This ensures a smooth, reliable, and efficient sales process at all times.

Salon & Spa ERP Software

The ultimate Salon & Spa ERP software for managing your business efficiently and comprehensively. Our extensive software suite covers appointments, Point of Sale, packages, coupons, purchases, sales, stock management, accounting, and more. Over the years, we have tailored our application to meet and exceed local business needs. While our system is robust and feature-rich, we recommend customization only when it offers clear benefits that outweigh the associated costs. This approach ensures you receive the best value and performance from our software, enhancing your salon or spa operations and overall success.
